findings.note: AC-002 tamper cases assert exit status and the rule ID 'stage-provenance' but not the specific detail message 'task plan hash is stale'. Mitigated: the fixture mutates only tasks.md and the sanity control validates the unmutated fixture, so the stale task-plan hash rules are the only reachable stage-provenance failures; still, pinning the detail string would make the assertion self-evident.

Registration in tests/run-all.sh is verified by grep for the suite filename only; a commented-out mention would satisfy it. run-all.sh itself is not in the bundle, so execution-in-aggregate is inferred rather than proven; the gate-phase full-suite rerun (Done When) is the compensating check.

The new Second Approval Replace call is over-indented relative to the three sibling masks — style-only cleanup for the human apply. Also note the suite header logs only CWS_SH, not CWS_PS1; which ps1 binary ran in green/gate is inferable only from outcomes (pre-fix live ps1 would have failed TEST-001 and broken parity).
